arts.ttl: Haaland, the most valuable footballer in the world in 2024
arts.sum: Transfermarkt, the website specializing in statistics and movements in the football market, has updated Erling Haaland’s market value - the Manchester City striker is now the most valuable footballer in the world with an estimate of 200 million euros ($221.5 million) . The Norwegian becomes just the second player to reach that figure - Kylian Mbappé, Real Madrid’s new No.9, hit the same value in December 2018 when he was still at PSG.
